overview.title: Azzaytuna University - Libya
overview.bio: Welcome to Al Zaytuna University - Libya! Discover excellence in education and limitless opportunities for growth.
overview.info: Azzaytuna University is a public higher education institution in Libya. It was founded in 1986 pursuant to Decree No. 46. The university was initially established under the name Nasser International University before being renamed Azzaytuna University. The university's faculties are distributed within the geographical boundaries of theTarhunah Municipality, in addition to the areas of Al-Awata and Sidi Al-Sayeh. Azzaytuna University grants bachelor's degrees across a wide range of academic disciplines and also offers master's and doctoral programs in selected specializations.

sign.title: How to Register with Us?
sign.content: To register at the university for academic and postgraduate studies, as well as for faculty members or participation in events.
